overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a forest trail that transitions from afternoon daylight through golden hour dusk into night, ending with an encounter with a child NPC near a rural village.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest trail with tall pines

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path through a sunlit forest with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest with visible tire tracks
tall evergreen trees forming a dense canopy
tall evergreen trees lining the right side of the path
green grass and shrubs alongside the trail
green grass and ferns growing beside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt trail through a dense sunlit forest. Tall pine trees line both sides of the path with thick underbrush visible at the edges. The camera follows steadily from behind as the character moves through the enclosed woodland environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional forest path opening to countryside

events.description: sunlight fades to dusk as shadows lengthen and the sky takes on golden hour tones

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as daylight transitions to evening with longer shadows cast across the trail

entered.detail: weathered wooden posts marking the path boundary
tree-covered hills visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: As dusk settles, the dense forest opens up to reveal distant hills on the horizon. Wooden fence posts appear along the right side of the path. The lighting shifts to a softer golden hue with long shadows stretching across the dirt trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: open countryside trail with stone walls at twilight

events.description: exits dense forest into open countryside with visible sunset sky and stone walls
sky shifts from orange sunset to deep purple and blue as night falls

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along a winding path bordered by stone walls as night falls and stars become visible

entered.detail: low stone wall running alongside the path made of stacked field stones
low stone wall marking field boundaries on the right
dramatic purple and orange twilight sky with scattered clouds
distant buildings with warm lights visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The path opens into wide countryside with low stone walls flanking the trail. The sky displays a dramatic sunset transitioning to night, with distant village lights becoming visible. The terrain gently ascends as Geralt continues walking through the open landscape.

events.description: encounters a child in red clothing walking ahead on the path toward the village

agents.ego_description: approaching a rural village at night, following a child NPC walking ahead on the path

notable_agents.action: child in red clothing walking ahead on the path toward the village buildings

entered.detail: wooden house with lit windows and thatched or shingled roof
simple wooden fence marking property boundary

segments.scene_description: At night, Geralt approaches a rural village with stone walls alongside the path. A child in red clothing walks ahead toward the village houses, which show warm light in their windows. The sky is now dark with stars visible as the character nears the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense forest that gradually opens into a wide countryside as daylight fades into a starry night. It begins with the camera following Geralt from behind along a winding dirt trail enclosed by tall pine trees and thick underbrush. As dusk settles, the woodland thins to reveal distant hills and wooden fence posts, while the lighting shifts to a soft golden hue with long shadows stretching across the path. The scene then expands into an open landscape flanked by low stone walls under a dramatic sunset, with the terrain gently ascending as distant village lights emerge. Finally, the environment transitions into full night under a starry sky, leading the camera toward a rural settlement where a child in red clothing walks ahead toward houses glowing with warm interior light.
